mapper.select:
select p.project_cd , p.project_nm , p.contract_sd , p.contract_ed , p.actual_input_sd , p.actual_end_ed , p.emp_id , e.emp_nm , p.use_yn , p.reg_dtm , p.reg_emp_id , p.mod_dtm , p.mod_emp_id , concat(p.contract_sd, ' ~ ', p.contract_ed) as projectDate from zzz_prjmngt_info p left join zzz_emp_info e on e.emp_id = p.emp_id
AND ( p.project_cd LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.project_nm LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
AND p.project_cd = #{projectCd}
AND p.project_nm LIKE CONCAT('%', #{projectNm}, '%')
